x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Field agent mobile app adoption determines whether Now Assist FSM AI features reach agents in the field.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Ensure all field agents have the fsm_agent or wm_agent role assigned and are active users. Drive FSM mobile app adoption. Enable Now Assist features in the FSM mobile app. Target: 10+ active field agents.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbd
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Field agent mobile app adoption determines whether Now Assist FSM AI features reach agents in the field.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Mobile App Adoption</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Query sys_user_has_role for FSM agent roles — more reliable than
    // querying sys_user.roles display field which is derived/unreliable
    var matched = {};

    function collectByRole(roleName) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_user_has_role');
        gr.addQuery('role.name', roleName);
        gr.addQuery('user.active', true);
        gr.addQuery('state', 'active');
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            matched[gr.getValue('user')] = true;
        }
    }

    collectByRole('fsm_agent');
    collectByRole('wm_agent');

    var agents = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = agents + ' active field service agents configured';

    if (agents >= 10) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: agents + ' active field agents configured. Now Assist FSM AI capabilities can be delivered to the field workforce via the mobile app.'
        };
    } else if (agents >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + agents + ' active field agents (target: 10+). Ensure all field agents are configured and using the FSM mobile app for Now Assist AI delivery.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + agents + ' active field agents configured. Now Assist FSM AI capabilities cannot be meaningfully delivered without a sufficient field agent user base.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000439</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Ensure all field agents have the fsm_agent or wm_agent role assigned and are active users. Drive FSM mobile app adoption. Enable Now Assist features in the FSM mobile app. Target: 10+ active field agents.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbd</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Mobile App Adoption</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbd</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
